geometry_lineage: The retained geometry came from an earlier closed-shell unconstrained optimization; its reported energy is a later LSD fixed-geometry single point. Only the displaced-endpoint optimization fixed the six Pt atoms.
comparison_scope: lineage-consistent recontact control compared only within the M2 control protocol
dispersion_geometry: PBE-D3(BJ) with C9 disabled for displaced controls; retained source optimization was earlier and method-distinct
